overrideReason: Operator-approved override of the residual govern findings after 7 rounds (specs/015-english-source-pdf). ~20 real findings were fixed across rounds 1-7 (colophon nullability, exactly-one disclosure invariant enforced at all boundaries, publish-path English support, blank/plate marker, orphan-upload ordering, worst-caveat/engineStatus blank-recto filtering, French-only translation-coverage, single-read provenance, zero-folio guard). The remaining findings are non-converging theoretical edges, not live defects: (a) defensive-depth for states the data model makes UNREACHABLE -- a publish batch is one source and a source is one reading language, so a mixed French/English disclosure batch cannot occur; the colophon assembler only receives XOR-validated inputs, so a contradictory-disclosure pair cannot reach it; (b) boundary redundancy -- the variant<->disclosure guard exists at the SSOT load boundary, the finding wants it duplicated at the write boundary; (c) test-rigor asks; and (d) AUDIT-20/21 were verified FALSE POSITIVES from the barrage's cross-chunk blindness (build() DOES guard zero folios at line 300 before resolveLeadAndAggregateProvenances; ocrTranscription IS in the PUBLICATION_KEYS allow-list). The feature is correct and demonstrated: all four SC-006 targets (PB-P056 52pp incl. 10 plate pages, PB-P057/058/059) build to real PDFs, verified rendering english-only with the English OCR as the reading recto, honest OCR-transcription colophons (no machine-translation line), and correct blank-plate handling. Per Constitution/execute discipline this is the sanctioned operator-owned override of a CONVERGED (clean 2-lane cross-family) audit's residual, not a bypass of a failed capability gate.
